scripts.dry-run: node cli/run-template.js --project-code demo --task-code sd_reference --prompt "Template smoke test" --dry-run
scripts.dry-run:video: node cli/video-generate.js --project-code demo --prompt "A lake" --image-url https://example.com/a.png --asset-mode none --dry-run
scripts.dry-run:project-assets:group: node cli/project-assets.js --project-code demo --action asset-group-create --name "Hero refs" --description "Dry run asset group" --dry-run
scripts.dry-run:project-assets:asset: node cli/project-assets.js --project-code demo --action asset-create --group-id 123 --url https://example.com/hero.png --name hero --dry-run
scripts.dry-run:workflow: node cli/run-workflow.js --workflow single-shot --project-code demo --prompt "A lake opening shot" --run-id dry-run-single-shot --dry-run
scripts.dry-run:one-shot: node cli/one-shot.js --project-code demo --project-name "Demo Project" --prompt "A lake opening shot" --run-id dry-run-one-shot --dry-run
